positive: A symmetrical, stylized mandala composition featuring bioluminescent jungle flora and stylized mythical fauna, such as hummingbirds and glowing moths. The composition should have clean, bold silhouettes and strong contrasts, resembling Art Nouveau meets futuristic naturalism. Central placement, radiating energy outwards, suitable for apparel printing. Dominant colors are deep indigo, electric teal, glowing emerald, and hints of pale gold. High level of detail, vector-art aesthetic, crisp linework, designed for graphic T-shirt print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, low detail, bad anatomy, messy, cartoon, photorealistic, bokeh, grainy, gradient background
